center.name: 史蒂芬港
center.summary: 史蒂芬港是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Forest kingfisher，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The forest kingfisher is native to Indonesia, Papua New Guinea, the Solomon Islands, and Australia, where it is found on or near the Australian coastline from Port Stephens in New South Wales northwards to Cape York and westwards across the Top End

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The forest kingfisher is native to Indonesia, Papua New Guinea, the Solomon Islands, and Australia, where it is found on or near the Australian coastline from Port Stephens in New South Wales northwards to Cape York and westwards across the Top End
